other_observers: Andrew Spencer; I heard about it from Joey Kellner. I read that others has seen this bird, but I don't remember who.
description: Blue head. Red eye ring, under parts, throat, rump, and upper tail coverts. Greenish yellow back and wings. Unmistakable.Behaviors: It was singing towards the top of trees and bushes.Call: Song is a lot like the other Colorado Buntings, a sweet warble. I was not able to ID by song.Plumage: Adult
